name: Indo- Carib Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak skewers in water for at least one hour.
2. Cube chicken into 1 1/2 inch pieces; best done when the chicken is partly frozen.
3. In a bowl, beat all remaining ingredients together except cilantro and rice.
4. Marinade chicken in the mixture for at least one hour.
5. Drain marinade from chicken. Place the marinade in a saucepan and boil/simmer for 5-10 minutes, stirring to thicken the sauce and kill bacteria. Salmonella is harmful; do not serve raw marinade.
6. Skewer the chicken and cook until done, brushing with any remaining marinade.
7. Turn the chicken appropriately while cooking.
8. Serve chicken over rice with boiled marinade and chopped cilantro.
